gameTitle: Lufia II: Rise of the Sinistrals

achievements.title: Training Day
achievements.description: Complete the training dungeon
achievements.notes: The Training Dungeon — south of Elcid. Complete all six training lessons to earn the Reset spell.

communityTips.text: I can't figure out why I haven't got the training day achievement, I finished he dungeon. Haaaaalp

achievements.title: Hero's Destiny
achievements.description: Meet Iris for the first time
achievements.notes: Cave Leading to Sundletan — after defeating Lizard Man, Iris appears and reveals Maxims destiny.

communityTips.text: The event didn't trigger until I died in Lake Cave

achievements.title: Fishing Time
achievements.description: Defeat Big Catfish in Lake Cave
achievements.notes: Lake Cave — defeat Big Catfish (HP: 200) to stop the earthquakes near Sundletan.

communityTips.text:
i swear i always get my first death here

feels like you should have tia for this

achievements.title: A King Without a Crown
achievements.description: Return the crown back to the king of Alunze
achievements.notes: Alunze Castle / The Basement — retrieve the stolen crown from the thieves and return it to the king.

communityTips.text:
for anyone reading this randomly, as a reward pick "nothing" and he gives you 3000 gold. the most you can get.
for money you get 2k
for princess 500
and for king 1000

achievements.title: The Lost Key
achievements.description: Defeat Regal Goblin
achievements.notes: North West Cave — defeat Regal Goblin (HP: 500) to obtain the Shrine Key.

achievements.title: Looking for Hilda
achievements.description: Defeat Camu in Tanbel Southeast Tower
achievements.notes: South East Tower (Tanbel) — defeat Camu. Weak to Lightning. Use Kukri swords with Thunder Blast IP.

communityTips.text: Anybody ever have this not unlock?
This is a progression achievement. Unless you had any connection issues or the RA server was down at that time you should have no problem unlocking it
Been playing through it now on stream, and have been getting achievements since. Ah well, I guess I'll come back with a second playthrough for that one :D Do these still trigger on retry mode?

achievements.title: Arachnophobia
achievements.description: Defeat Tarantula in Ruby Cave
achievements.notes: Ruby Cave — defeat Tarantula (HP: 1,600). Weak to Fire. Use Fire Dagger IP (Blaze Attack).

achievements.title: For King and Country
achievements.description: Defeat Pierre and Danielle in Treasure Sword Shrine
achievements.notes: Treasure Sword Shrine — defeat Pierre (weak to Water/Ice) and Danielle (weak to Fire/Lightning) consecutively.

achievements.title: The Prince's Ego
achievements.description: Rescue the prince of Bound Kingdom from the North Labyrinth
achievements.notes: North Labyrinth (Bound Kingdom) — rescue Prince Alex. Dekar saves the prince after the Idura trap.

achievements.title: Happy Ending...?
achievements.description: Escape from the Ancient Tower after Gades is defeated
achievements.notes: Ancient Tower — defeat Gades. Maxim stays behind to shut off destruction controls; Iris teleports him to safety.

achievements.title: Child Abduction
achievements.description: Rescue Jeros from Idura
achievements.notes: North Lighthouse — defeat Idura (HP: 1,500, weak to Ice). Iris rescues Jeros during the encounter.

achievements.title: The Phantom Tree
achievements.description: Find the location of the Phantom Tree
achievements.notes: Phantom Tree Mountain — find Jyad, defeat the two Lions (HP: 900 each), discover the Phantom Tree.

achievements.title: The Mysterious Melody
achievements.description: Find out about the missing women of Narcysus
achievements.notes: Narcysus / Tower of Sacrifice — investigate the missing women, defeat Idura (HP: 2,550, weak to Ice) in the tower.

achievements.title: The Useless Servant
achievements.description: Defeat Idura for one last time and find your way out
achievements.notes: Karlloon North Shrine — final Idura fight (HP: 3,600, weak to Ice). Use Dekars Fatal Blow. Dekar stays behind to hold off monsters.

achievements.title: The Priphea
achievements.description: Bring a Priphea to Leefa at Treadool
achievements.notes: Flower Mountain — defeat Rogue Flower (HP: 3,300, weak to Fire). Deliver the Priphea to Leefa in Treadool.

achievements.title: Preventing a War
achievements.description: Recover the Ruby Icon from Dankirk North Dungeon
achievements.notes: Northern Dungeon (Dankirk) — recover the Ruby Icon to prevent the war.

achievements.title: Artea
achievements.description: Have Artea join your group
achievements.notes: Shaia Lab / Story Events — Artea joins at level 38 near Eserikto after Sinistral Amon kidnaps Karyn.

achievements.title: 20.000 Leagues Under the Sea
achievements.description: Convert your ship into a submarine
achievements.notes: Portravia / Kirmo Lab — Lexis and Kirmo convert your ship into a submarine. Happens after Eserikto events.

achievements.title: The Cursed One
achievements.description: Defeat Venge Ghost in Shrine of Vengeance
achievements.notes: Shrine of Vengeance — defeat Venge Ghost. Accessible underwater via submarine near Barnan.

achievements.title: The Power of Love
achievements.description: Find the Magic Mirror in Tower of Truth
achievements.notes: Tower of Truth — find the Magic Mirror. Proves Selan and Maxims bond.

achievements.title: Dragon Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat Fire Dragon in Dragon Mountain
achievements.notes: Dragon Mountain — defeat Fire Dragon. Weak to Ice. Use Ice.Valk spells and dragon-slaying weapons.

achievements.title: Airship
achievements.description: Convert your ship into an airship
achievements.notes: Story Events after Submarine Shrine — Lexis repairs and upgrades the ship into an airship after the Dual Blade is claimed.

achievements.title: Blade of the Gods
achievements.description: Obtain the Dual Blade
achievements.notes: Submarine Shrine / Doom Island — the Dual Blade chooses Maxim over Daos. Found in the submerged shrine.

achievements.title: Final Countdown
achievements.description: Bring peace to the world
achievements.notes: Doom Island — defeat Daos and all four Sinistrals to bring peace to the world.

achievements.title: I Am Immortal
achievements.description: Obtain Jute Helm in Tanbel Southeast Tower
achievements.notes: South East Tower (Tanbel) — solve the clock puzzle (set to 12:00) to reveal the secret room with Jute Helm.

communityTips.text:
this is really old but still
https://i.imgur.com/nGpM3Ze.png
this is the solution.

if you cant see it, push the pillar to the top and the brown/orange block 1 space below it (so they 2 are touching)

achievements.title: Hey Pretty Lady, I've Got a Weird Thing to Show You
achievements.description: Obtain Seethru Cape and equip Tia with it
achievements.missableCutoff: Tia leaves the party permanently after the Treasure Sword Shrine
achievements.notes: Purchase Seethru Cape (10,000 coins) at Gruberik Casino and equip on Tia BEFORE she leaves the party permanently. Tia leaves after the Parcelyte/Treasure Sword Shrine segment — buy the cape as early as Alunzes casino.

achievements.title: Beaten by Strangers
achievements.description: Defeat Gades in Gordovan Tower and obtain his sword
achievements.missableCutoff: Must be done during the first Gades encounter in Gordovan Tower
achievements.notes: Gordovan Tower — defeat Gades despite the game expecting you to lose. Use Jet Helm (Sluggish effect), Mind Ring (Stronger), and Eagle Rocks. Winning earns the Gades Sword. Normal story loss is also fine.

achievements.title: Memory Games
achievements.description: Solve the puzzle at North Lighthouse with at least 1 set of spikes up
achievements.notes: North Lighthouse — solve the crate/switch puzzle with at least one set of spikes still raised.

achievements.title: Dragon Sword
achievements.description: Obtain and equip Maxim with the Dragon Blade
achievements.notes: Purchase Dragon Blade (500,000 coins) at Gruberik Casino and equip on Maxim. Use the Engage Ring for a discount.

achievements.title: Bunny Sword
achievements.description: Obtain and equip Selan with the Bunny Sword
achievements.notes: Purchase Bunny Sword (60,000 coins) at Gruberik Casino and equip on Selan.

achievements.title: Millionaire
achievements.description: Have 1.000.000 or more coins from the casino
achievements.notes: Casino — accumulate 1,000,000 or more coins from slot machines. Grind at any casino (Alunze, Gruberik, etc.).

achievements.title: VIP Member
achievements.description: Obtain the VIP card for the casino
achievements.notes: Casino — earn the VIP membership card through continued play.

achievements.title: Holy Whip
achievements.description: Obtain the Holy Whip at Divine Shrine
achievements.notes: Divine Shrine — found as hidden treasure. Break a wall with the Hammer after solving the music tile puzzle (order: 3-2-4-1-5).

achievements.title: The Wishmaker
achievements.description: Obtain all 8 dragon eggs and make a wish
achievements.notes: Side Quests — Forfeit Island. Collect all 8 dragon eggs hidden throughout the game and make a wish.

achievements.title: The Wishmaker 2
achievements.description: Make all 4 wishes
achievements.notes: Side Quests — Forfeit Island. Make all 4 wishes with the collected dragon eggs.

achievements.title: I Need More Wishes
achievements.description: Defeat the Egg Dragon
achievements.notes: Side Quests — The Egg Dragon. After making all wishes, defeat the Egg Dragon in a bonus battle.

achievements.title: The World's Most Difficult Trick
achievements.description: Solve the world's most difficult trick in Dragon Mountain
achievements.notes: Dragon Mountain — solve the complex bomb, arrow, and block puzzle known as the worlds most difficult trick.

achievements.title: Scout
achievements.description: Reach level 10 with Maxim
achievements.notes: Reach level 10 with Maxim. Completes naturally early in the Main Walkthrough.

achievements.title: Hero
achievements.description: Reach level 25 with Maxim
achievements.notes: Reach level 25 with Maxim. Completes naturally during the mid-game.

achievements.title: Mighty Hero
achievements.description: Reach level 50 with Maxim
achievements.notes: Reach level 50 with Maxim. May require some grinding near endgame or in the Ancient Cave.

achievements.title: Renowned Hero
achievements.description: Reach level 75 with Maxim
achievements.notes: Reach level 75 with Maxim. Best pursued in the Ancient Cave or through extensive endgame grinding.

achievements.title: Legendary Hero
achievements.description: Reach level 99 with Maxim
achievements.notes: Reach level 99 with Maxim. Extremely time-consuming. Best done in the deep Ancient Cave floors.

achievements.title: Jelze
achievements.description: Obtain the Jelze capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Foomy (Jelze) — your first capsule monster, found in Foomy Woods near Alunze / Alunze North Shrine. Feed with Long Knives.

achievements.title: Blaze
achievements.description: Obtain the Blaze capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Blaze — found in Ruby Cave. Breathes fire. Feed with Long Knives.

achievements.title: Flash
achievements.description: Obtain the Flash capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Flash (Shaggy) — found in North Labyrinth (Bound Kingdom). Can heal the party but has low attack power.

achievements.title: Gusto
achievements.description: Obtain the Gusto capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Gusto (Hard Hat) — found in Tower of Sacrifice (Narcysus).

achievements.title: Sully
achievements.description: Obtain the Sully capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Sully (Raddisher) — found in Flower Mountain. Strong like Guy but low speed and magic resistance.

achievements.title: Darbi
achievements.description: Obtain the Darbi capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Darbi — found on a small island with a tree, west of Barnan (submarine required).

achievements.title: Zeppy
achievements.description: Obtain the Zeppy capsule monster
achievements.notes: Obtain Zeppy — found in Capsule Cave (Ue Mov Cave), underwater near Parcelyte (submarine required).

achievements.title: Capsule Monster Collector
achievements.description: Obtain all 7 capsule monsters
achievements.notes: Collect all 7 capsule monsters: Jelze, Blaze, Flash (Sully), Gusto, Darbi, Zeppy, and one more. See Capsule Monsters section for locations.

achievements.title: Master Jelze
achievements.description: Upgrade Jelze to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Jelze (Foomy) appropriate food to reach class 5. See Capsule Monsters section for feeding guide.

achievements.title: Master Blaze
achievements.description: Upgrade Blaze to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Blaze appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Master Flash
achievements.description: Upgrade Flash to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Flash (Sully) appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Master Gusto
achievements.description: Upgrade Gusto to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Gusto appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Master Sully
achievements.description: Upgrade Sully to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Sully (Raddisher) appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Master Darbi
achievements.description: Upgrade Darbi to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Darbi appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Master Zeppy
achievements.description: Upgrade Zeppy to class 5
achievements.notes: Feed Zeppy appropriate food to reach class 5.

achievements.title: Power House
achievements.description: Upgrade all seven capsule monsters to class 5
achievements.notes: Upgrade all 7 capsule monsters to class 5. Feed each monster its preferred food. See Capsule Monsters section.

achievements.title: Beginner Explorer
achievements.description: Reach B21 in the Ancient Dungeon
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — reach floor B21. Providence item on B20 lets you escape. Located on Forfeit Island.

achievements.title: Spelunker
achievements.description: Reach B41 in the Ancient Dungeon
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — reach floor B41.

achievements.title: Advanced Hunter
achievements.description: Reach B61 in the Ancient Dungeon
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — reach floor B61.

achievements.title: Master Adventurer
achievements.description: Reach B81 in the Ancient Dungeon
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — reach floor B81.

achievements.title: Expert Explorer
achievements.description: Reach the final floor of the Ancient Dungeon
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — reach the final floor (B99).

achievements.title: R. A. Legend - Lufia II
achievements.description: Legitimately defeat the Master Jelly in the Ancient Cave reducing its HP to 0
achievements.notes: Ancient Cave — legitimately defeat the Master Jelly on the final floor by reducing its HP to 0. The hardest challenge in the game (100 pts).

communityTips.text: Dekar Blade and Gades Blade + Spell Trick = ±7500 damage.  This makes it easy for the boss.

I did it without Dekar (used the main 4 people at end game) at around level 57-59. I didn't even have Trick either, but I had 2 power drugs which was enough to boost my Gades Blade octohit thing to do around 4000 damage total. I ended up doing the exact amount of damage needed on the final hit haha. Very stressful don't recommend doing this without Dekar, but it was fun nonetheless.

Dekar makes this a joke IF you get the Dekar Blade during your run. My loadout was Dekar with Dekar Blade, Maxim with Myth Blade, Guy with Gades Blade, and Selan (equipment doesn't matter here).

I didn't have Trick, but I did get two power gourds, which I dumped onto Guy. Round 1, Maxim and Dekar use their IPs to take off ~6000 HP from the front row while Guy and Selan dumped power gourds. Second turn, Guy unleashed Octo Strike and that was all she wrote.
